mapper.sql: id::text AS id, server_id::text AS server_id, remote_original_name, tool_description, exposed_model_name, schema_json, schema_hash, status, deleted_at, created_at, updated_at, last_synced_at
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM t_mcp_tool_catalog WHERE server_id = CAST(#{serverId} AS uuid) AND deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY exposed_model_name ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_mcp_tool_catalog ( id, server_id, remote_original_name, tool_description, exposed_model_name, schema_json, schema_hash, status, deleted_at, created_at, updated_at, last_synced_at ) VALUES ( CAST(#{id} AS uuid), CAST(#{serverId} AS uuid), #{remoteOriginalName}, #{toolDescription}, #{exposedModelName}, #{schemaJson}, #{schemaHash}, #{status}, #{deletedAt}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}, #{lastSyncedAt} ) ON CONFLICT (server_id, remote_original_name) WHERE deleted_at IS NULL DO UPDATE SET tool_description = EXCLUDED.tool_description, exposed_model_name = EXCLUDED.exposed_model_name, schema_json = EXCLUDED.schema_json, schema_hash = EXCLUDED.schema_hash, status = EXCLUDED.status, deleted_at = NULL, updated_at = EXCLUDED.updated_at, last_synced_at = EXCLUDED.last_synced_at
mapper.update: DELETE FROM t_mcp_tool_catalog WHERE server_id = CAST(#{serverId} AS uuid) AND deleted_at IS NULL
